meaning: n.闊ｹ霄ｫ蜑榊濠驛ｨ,蠑ｹ菴灘燕驛ｨ
examples: Calculated values of the aerodynamical loads on a tangent-ogive forebody compare well -with experimental data.
On the basis of the above, the mechanism is investigated by which the chine forebody can delay delta wing vortex burst.
The paper gives variations in the forebody drag, the normal force and the pressure center in accordance with the Mach Numbers and the geometric parameters.
